title: Effects of indivisible obligations between more than one obligor or obligee
doc_html:
Art. 1818.  Effects of indivisible obligations between more than one obligor or obligee

An indivisible obligation with more than one obligor or obligee is subject to the rules governing solidary obligations.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
